name: Voice Pipeline Debug Cycle
description: Orchestrated, evidence-based audit of Voice Library V2 + Voice Injection Layer + Pangram policy, producing a consolidated report and patch plan.
objective: Identify correctness gaps and policy conflicts; prove runtime wiring; deliver patch-ready recommendations without applying changes.
key_decisions: Phase 1 is read-only audit with evidence; Phase 2 is patch plan only.
Do not mistake prompt docs for runtime wiring; require script entrypoint proof.
Pangram should be ad-hoc calibration, not an automatic gate (unless explicitly re-authorized).

workers.description: Find the real runtime entrypoints for each generator (email/blurb/X/social post). Prove whether voice injection is applied in code or only documented in prompts. Output a report with evidence (file paths + grep excerpts).

Audit voice_library.db for (a) sensitive primitives, (b) short/low-quality primitives, (c) domain distribution, (d) over-specific LinkedIn artifacts. Propose gating fields/filters. Output a report with counts and examples.
Inventory where Pangram is referenced as an auto-gate/auto-retry vs ad-hoc calibration. Identify conflicts and propose a single canonical Pangram workflow. Output a report + patch recommendations.
Audit prompt frontmatter/version/provenance consistency for modified prompts and identify inconsistencies (e.g., footer vs frontmatter version, missing metadata). Output a report + patch suggestions.
